overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through the rainy, foggy streets of Saint Denis at night. The character navigates historic cobblestone streets with tram tracks, passing ornate brick buildings with wrought iron balconies, illuminated by warm street lamps and neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with hotel and tram tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet cobblestone street, approaching a large illuminated horse billboard

entered.detail: multi-story brick building with illuminated windows and hotel signage
historic stone building at street corner with ground floor shops
rain-slicked cobblestone road reflecting street lamp light
metal tram rails embedded in the cobblestone street surface
large illuminated sign with horse silhouette and number 72

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow historic street at night, flanked by tall brick buildings. The wet cobblestones reflect the warm glow of street lamps as the character approaches a prominent illuminated horse billboard in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with ornate balconies

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street, passing beneath the large horse billboard and alongside buildings with wrought iron balconies

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn cart parked on the right side of the street

entered.detail: historic building with ornate wrought iron balconies and illuminated signage reading Le Lion D'Or
decorative black iron railings on second floor of buildings
red brick building with Rose & Olivier signage
blue painted historic structure with multiple windows and ground floor entrance

segments.scene_description: The character passes beneath the large horse billboard and continues along the street lined with ornate wrought iron balconies. The Le Lion D'Or building stands prominently on the right, while a blue historic building appears on the left. A parked horse-drawn cart sits on the right sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with tram lines crossing

events.description: a tram streetcar passes through the intersection from left to right
character reaches intersection and turns to face a different street direction

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, waiting for the tram to pass, then turning to proceed down a new street

notable_agents.action: tram moving through the intersection on tracks

entered.detail: red and white electric tram with illuminated windows moving on tracks
wide cobblestone intersection where multiple streets meet with tram tracks crossing
building with Furniture signage visible on the facade

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide intersection where tram tracks cross. A tram passes through the scene from left to right. After the tram clears, the character turns and begins walking down a new street, leaving the previous buildings behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy historic commercial street with chocolate factory

agents.ego_description: walking down the new street away from the intersection, passing the Snowberger building

entered.detail: brick building with large painted signage reading Snowberger Chocolate Co
street continuing into the distance with heavy fog and scattered lights

segments.scene_description: Having turned at the intersection, the character now walks down a foggy street lined with brick commercial buildings. The Snowberger Chocolate Co building stands prominently on the left as the street stretches ahead into the misty night, illuminated by distant street lamps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the rainy, nocturnal streets of Saint Denis, transitioning from a narrow historic corridor into a wide, misty intersection. It begins with the character walking down a narrow street flanked by tall brick buildings, where wet cobblestones reflect the warm glow of street lamps leading toward a prominent illuminated horse billboard. As the character passes beneath the billboard, the view opens to reveal ornate wrought iron balconies and the Le Lion D'Or building on the right, while a parked horse-drawn cart sits along the sidewalk. The scene then expands into a wide intersection as a tram crosses from left to right, before the camera turns away from the previous architecture to follow the character down a new path. Finally, the environment shifts into a fog-shrouded street lined with commercial brick buildings, passing the Snowberger Chocolate Co as the path stretches forward into the misty night.
